items.title: ILA Berlin 2026: ESA Director General press conference
items.summary: Video: 00:26:00 ESA Director General Josef Aschbacher briefed media representatives and discussed Europe's priorities in space, exploration, resilience and the future of the European space sector.

items.title: Tracking urban expansion in hazard-prone areas
items.summary: The World Settlement Footprint (WSF) Tracker, and its dedicated online platform, have been officially released at an event at the World Bank headquarters in Washington DC.

items.title: Air Pollution’s Daily Pulse Over the Northeast
items.summary: The TEMPO mission helped scientists track morning nitrogen dioxide that contributed to afternoon ozone along the New York–Washington corridor in May 2026.
